description: A company needs to open a new bank account, which requires a formal corporate resolution. A paralegal needs to draft it.

nodes.task_description: Select the firm's template for a board resolution to open a bank account.
Populate the template with the company's name, the name of the bank, and the names of the authorized signatories.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent fills in all the specific details.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the resolution for the board of directors to sign.

expected_outcome.expected: A complete draft resolution is generated, ready for execution.
